prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mercedes-Benz M160 0.7L turbocharged inline-3 (engine code: 450.940) with a forged crankshaft, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 250+ HP via a Garrett GT2259 turbocharger with a custom 3.5-bar MAP sensor and AEM 30-0300 wideband O2 controller

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint with 200-cell catalytic converters and a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler, paired with a custom ECU tune by Dyno Dynamics using a standalone Megasquirt MS3Pro PNP adapter for the M160

KW Suspensions Variant 3 coilovers with adjustable camber plates, Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers, and Brembo GT 330mm front brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines
estetica: Rocket Bunny Pandem Smart Roadster widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders, finished in BASF R-M Diamont metallic paint with a matte black roof
OMP HTE-R carbon fiber racing seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel and a custom aluminum quick-release hub

Custom LED taillight conversion by LUX Automotive with sequential turn signals, smoked headlight lenses with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs, and a custom carbon fiber engine cover with a clear polycarbonate inspection panel
